ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF(AND(RecordType.Name = 'SDA Insolvency Account',CONTAINS($Profile.Name,"Community User")), IF(AND(OR(ISNEW(),ISCHANGED(Insolvency_Status__c)),NOT(ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, 'No PoC Required'))), OR(ISBLANK(Claim_Amount__c), ISBLANK(Interest_Rate__c), ISBLANK(Last_Statement_Date__c), ISBLANK(Last_Statement_Amount__c),ISBLANK(Last_Payment_Date__c), ISBLANK(Last_Payment_Amount__c)), false), false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Following fields are mandatory: Claim Amount, Interest Rate, Last Statement Date, Last Statement Amount, Last Payment Date, Last Payment Amount
